name: @intentsolutionsio/agency-os
description: Run your work like an AI agency, from a single Notion board. Agents discuss, plan, and execute tasks in parallel with dependency ordering and model routing.

scripts.postinstall: node -e "console.log(\"\\n→ This npm package is a tracking/proof artifact. Install the plugin via:\\n  ccpi install agency-os\\n  or /plugin install agency-os@claude-code-plugins-plus in Claude Code\\n\")"
